title: R28 — Hide 'Install RingIn' banner on native app
notes: FIX: The 'Install RingIn → Tap menu (⋮)' banner no longer shows inside the native APK. It's a PWA install prompt meant only for users visiting the website in a browser — pointless when the app is already installed natively.
Detection now checks Capacitor.isNativePlatform() first; bails out early if running inside the native shell.
Includes all R23+R24+R25+R26+R27 features from previous bundle (verification, subscriptions, Workshops + Anonymous Connect restored).
